name: Married filers at high income in Zug (2026)
description: Married couple with combined income of CHF 150,000 in Zug, the lowest-tax canton

sources.description: Verified using Swiss tax calculation engine with progressive cantonal brackets. Federal tax calculated using official 2026 Bundessteuer tariff for married filers (includes CHF 2,800 married deduction). Zug cantonal/municipal tax uses progressive marginal rates for married: 3% up to CHF 50k, 5% from CHF 50k-150k = (50000×3% + 100000×5%) = CHF 6,500. Zug has Switzerland's lowest tax burden. Social security includes ALV solidarity contribution (0.5% above CHF 148,200 cap).
Social security rates verified against BSV official documentation (ALV: 1.1% up to CHF 148,200, then 0.5% solidarity contribution)
Cross-verification via third-party calculator (single filer approximation)
